# TemplateCandidateProposalReport

Source: `schemas/template-candidate-proposal-report.schema.json`

Schema ID: `https://thesisdocx.local/schemas/template-candidate-proposal-report.schema.json`

Report produced when reviewed DOCX format candidate decisions are applied to a proposed TemplatePackage copy.

Type: `object`
